segments.speaker: A
segments.text: Welcome to the show. Today we're talking about building APIs with Hono.

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Thanks for having me. I've been working on Hona for about two years now.

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: So for people who haven't heard of it, what is Hono and why should they care?

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Hono is a small fast web framework that runs on any JavaScript runtime. It works on Cloudflare Workers, Deno, Bun, Node, you name it.

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: That's interesting. How does it compare to Express performance wise?

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: We're significantly faster than Express in benchmarks. The router uses a radix tree so route matching is O of log n instead of O of n.

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: And you recently added RPC support right? Tell us about that.

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Yes the RPC feature lets you get end to end type safety between your API and client. Similar to tRPC but built into the framework.

segments.speaker: A
segments.text: Where can people learn more about Hono?

segments.speaker: B
segments.text: Check out hono.dev for docs and the GitHub repo at github.com slash honojs slash hono.
